---
title: "Data Summary"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(glue)
library(reactable)
library(htmltools)

# в”Ђв”Ђ Configuration в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

FOLDER_PATH <- "metadata"   # <-- change this

# Column name mapping (case-insensitive)
COL_STATE    <- "State"
COL_DISTRICT <- "District"
COL_DATE     <- "Date"

# в”Ђв”Ђ Read and combine all Excel files в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

xlsx_files <- list.files(FOLDER_PATH, pattern = "\\.xlsx$", full.names = TRUE)

if (length(xlsx_files) == 0) stop("No .xlsx files found in: ", FOLDER_PATH)

combined_df <- xlsx_files |>
  set_names(basename) |>
  map(\(path) {
    read_excel(path) |>
      mutate(
        file_source = sub("^[^_]*_(.+)\\.xlsx$", "\\1", basename(path)),
        .before = 1
      )
  }) |>
  list_rbind()

# в”Ђв”Ђ Normalise column names в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

find_col <- function(df, target) {
  match <- names(df)[tolower(names(df)) == tolower(target)]
  if (length(match) == 0) stop(glue(
    "Column '{target}' not found. Available: {paste(names(df), collapse = ', ')}"
  ))
  match[1]
}

state_col    <- find_col(combined_df, COL_STATE)
district_col <- find_col(combined_df, COL_DISTRICT)
date_col     <- find_col(combined_df, COL_DATE)

# в”Ђв”Ђ Build summary table в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

summary_df <- combined_df |>
  group_by(
    `File Source`    = file_source,
    State            = .data[[state_col]],
    District         = .data[[district_col]],
    `Reporting Date` = as.Date(.data[[date_col]])
  ) |>
  summarise(`Number of Entries` = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
  arrange(`File Source`, State, District, `Reporting Date`)

# в”Ђв”Ђ Colour scale for entries column в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ

entries_pal <- function(x) {
  rng  <- range(x, na.rm = TRUE)
  norm <- (x - rng[1]) / max(rng[2] - rng[1], 1)
  r <- round(255 - norm * (255 - 33))
  g <- round(255 - norm * (255 - 113))
  b <- round(255 - norm * (255 - 181))
  paste0("rgb(", r, ",", g, ",", b, ")")
}

entry_colors <- entries_pal(summary_df[["Number of Entries"]])
```

```{r subtitle}
n_entries <- format(nrow(combined_df), big.mark = ",")
n_files   <- length(xlsx_files)
gen_date  <- format(Sys.Date(), "%d %b %Y")
```

::: {.report-subtitle}
`r glue("{n_entries} total entries across {n_files} file(s)")`  В·  Source: `r FOLDER_PATH`  В·  Generated `r gen_date`
:::

```{r table}
reactable(
  summary_df,
  searchable          = TRUE,
  filterable          = TRUE,
  defaultPageSize     = 20,
  showPageSizeOptions = TRUE,
  pageSizeOptions     = c(10, 20, 50, 100),
  sortable            = TRUE,
  defaultSorted       = list(`File Source` = "asc", State = "asc"),
  resizable           = TRUE,
  striped             = TRUE,
  highlight           = TRUE,
  bordered            = TRUE,
  columns = list(
    `File Source` = colDef(
      name     = "File Source",
      minWidth = 160,
      cell     = function(value) tags$span(
        style = "font-weight:600; color:#1a5276;", value
      )
    ),
    State            = colDef(name = "State",          minWidth = 120),
    District         = colDef(name = "District",       minWidth = 130),
    `Reporting Date` = colDef(
      name     = "Reporting Date",
      minWidth = 130,
      format   = colFormat(date = TRUE, locales = "en-GB")
    ),
    `Number of Entries` = colDef(
      name     = "# Entries",
      minWidth = 100,
      align    = "right",
      format   = colFormat(separators = TRUE),
      style    = function(value, index) list(
        background = entry_colors[index],
        fontWeight = "600"
      ),
      footer = function(values) tags$b(format(sum(values), big.mark = ","))
    )
  ),
  defaultColDef = colDef(footerStyle = list(fontWeight = "bold")),
  theme = reactableTheme(
    color            = "#1c2833",
    backgroundColor  = "#ffffff",
    borderColor      = "#dde3ea",
    stripedColor     = "#f4f7fb",
    highlightColor   = "#e8f0fe",
    cellPadding      = "8px 14px",
    searchInputStyle = list(width = "100%"),
    style            = list(fontFamily = "Lato, sans-serif", fontSize = "14px"),
    headerStyle      = list(
      background  = "#1a5276",
      color       = "#ffffff",
      fontWeight  = "700",
      borderColor = "#154360"
    ),
    filterInputStyle = list(
      background  = "#eaf0fb",
      borderColor = "#aac4e8",
      fontSize    = "12px"
    ),
    footerStyle = list(
      background = "#d6e4f0",
      color      = "#1a5276",
      fontWeight = "bold"
    )
  )
)
```

<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Lato:wght@400;600;700&display=swap');
body { font-family: 'Lato', sans-serif; }
.report-subtitle {
  font-size: 13px;
  color: #7f8c8d;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
}
</style>
